instruction: Fix the config loader so Settings are resolved from defaults, an optional JSON config file, and environment overrides with precedence environment > config file > defaults. Settings has host, port, and debug. JSON config keys are host, port, and debug only; unknown keys are invalid. APP_HOST, APP_PORT, and APP_DEBUG override matching fields. host must be a string. port must be an int or numeric string in the range 1..65535, and booleans are not valid ports. debug must be a bool or exactly "true" or "false"; values like "1", "0", "yes", and "no" are invalid. Passing None as the config path means no file is read, while a missing explicit path raises FileNotFoundError. Invalid config contents or invalid values raise ValueError.
